questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Most practices are fully set up within 2 weeks. Our team handles customization, data migration, and training to ensure a smooth transition.

questions.question: Can patients book their own appointments?
questions.answer: Yes, our system includes a patient-facing portal that can be integrated with your website. You control which appointment types are available for self-scheduling and can set rules for each provider.

questions.question: Will this integrate with my existing practice management software?
questions.answer: We integrate with most major dental practice management systems including Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Open Dental, and more. Our team can provide compatibility information for your specific setup.

questions.question: How are appointment reminders handled?
questions.answer: Our system sends automated reminders via email, SMS, or phone based on your preferences. You can customize the timing, frequency, and content of reminders, and patients can confirm or request changes with a single click.

questions.question: What happens if I need to change my subscription level?
questions.answer: You can upgrade or downgrade your subscription at any time. Changes typically take effect on your next billing cycle, and our team will help ensure a smooth transition between plans.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
reviews.comment: The scheduling system has transformed our practice efficiency. We've reduced no-shows by 45% and our team saves hours each day on administrative tasks.

reviews.name: Mark Johnson
reviews.comment: Managing appointments for our 7 providers used to be a nightmare. Now it's streamlined and our patients love the online booking option.

reviews.name: Dr. Michael Rivera
reviews.comment: The ability to customize appointment types for different procedures has been game-changing for our specialty practice. Implementation was smooth and support has been excellent.
